form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Hobart Bm68 December 14 over 1400m, soft track; 5 len behind Restricted Access carrying 59kg at $7.50. Previously first up; fifth of 7 at this track Bm72 October 3 over 1100m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Thoros Of Myr carrying 59.5kg at $19. Doesn't warrant consideration fresh.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at this track Cl6 Sw October 24 over 1420m, 0.5 len behind Sh'bourne Midnight carrying 57kg at $9.50. First up last campaign fourth of 8 at Devonport Synthetic Bm60 June 1 over 1150m, 1.5 len behind Cornelian Bay with 58.5kg at $4.80. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run sat on the pace when 2nd of 7 at this track Open on April 3 over 1200m, 2 len behind Perola carrying 54kg at $12. The start before that got back early 4th in a small field at this track Open Hcp on March 13 over 1100m, slow going 1.5 len behind Cherokee Dancer carrying 54kg at $18. Hard to beat on her best form.

form.formComment: Most recently got back early 4th in a small field at this track Cl4 Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Mastretta carrying 55kg at $2.45. Before that 10th of 12 at this track in the G3 Vamos Stks on February 25 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sanniya carrying 57kg at $61. Top record course and distance and is sure to measure up here.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at this track Cl3 March 27 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Novalargo with 59kg at $6. The race before that raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at this track Cl4 Sw on February 25 over 1400m, 6 len behind Agnete carrying 57kg at $5. Has won three of last four and looks a leading chance again.

form.formComment: Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 10 at Hobart Bm60 on March 22 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Volkanovski carrying 59.5kg at $5. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track Bm68 on March 4 over 1220m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Golden Meadow carrying 57.5kg at $6. Definitely one to consider.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Not raced for 49 days. First-up second last in a small field at Hobart 3&4yo Sw on February 6 over 1200m, slow going 5 len behind Perspiration carrying 57kg at $61. Second run from a spell second last of 10 at this track 3/4yo Hcp on February 20 over 1400m, 5 len behind Cripps with 52kg at $26. Likely improver who should be in the mix.
